## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Refactor / chore / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` and (if `packages/core` changed) `npm run test:core` pass
- [ ] I added a **changeset** (`npm run changeset`) if this changes `@hiperbrain/core`
- [ ] No secrets or `.env*` files are committed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or the public API changed
